features.evidence: I am currently in a healthcare program and the storage has been great so far and love it more than my macbook air!for the price you can’t beat it and is very quick when i’m flipping to different docs or websites! This is a well built computer designed to compete with a MacBook Air and its price category.
I love how long the battery lasts. The screen is bright and clear, the battery lasts for her and there have been no hiccups with the memory capacity while she uses many different functions.
value: average battery life in hours: 23 Hours

features.evidence: if you're a Windows person this is a solid choice. The keyboard and trackpad frequently freeze at the same time, the cursor disappears, Windows Settings hangs while loading, system and firmware updates repeatedly fail, my desktop background resets on its own, and now Microsoft Word files are being automatically sent to the Recycle Bin the moment I open them without me deleting anything.
